work_unit: M-005 storage_state JSON 0644 permissions → chmod 0600 + O_EXCL flock-style
situation: audit-2026-07-06-020 finding M-005: scripts/export-xhs-cookie.js line 60 calls context.storageState({ path }) which writes session cookies/tokens as 0644 (world-readable). Any local user on the machine can steal XHS login session.
action: Replace storageState({path}) with storageState()→writeStorageStateSecure helper. Helper opens file with mode 0o600 via fs.openSync (sets perms at creation, avoids 0644→0600 race window), writes JSON, then belt-and-braces chmodSync(0o600) in case umask interfered. Single-file route-fix.
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded; branch auto/opt-storage-state-perms-1783337790 pushed to origin; node --check syntax OK; helper uses openSync with mode 0o600 + chmodSync fallback
next_suggestion: 派生 L-002 (--no-sandbox container-detect gate) 后本轮 fix-in-progress 可收尾；两 pending 都 merged 后 audit-cycle-state.status → cycle-complete 触发下一轮全量审计

audit_findings.finding: context.storageState({ path }) writes session cookies/tokens as 0644 world-readable — any local user can steal XHS login
audit_findings.remediation: Use storageState() without path, then write via openSync(path, 'w', 0o600) + chmodSync(0o600) helper
